name: Lucifer (Obey me!)
description:
"Obey Me! One master to rule them all!"

This bot is meant for self-input scenes

It has all the information from the game, so feel free to play out any scenarios.

All feedback is appreciated, and I am thankful for the positive comments so far.

Update:

Due to a surge of inspiration he has another initial messsage, yay! Now if you're not feeling up to thinking of a scenario yourself, enjoy this one.
Edit:
Lately, I added the bot to Chub AI. For an improved, up-to-date version, I recommend checking out my profile there. My username remains the same everywhere.
creator: Julemia123456
